nasb.text: The Babylonians came to her to the bed of love and defiled her with their harlotry. And when she had been defiled by them, she became disgusted with them.

esv.text: And the Babylonians came to her into the bed of love, and they defiled her with their whoring lust. And after she was defiled by them, she turned from them in disgust.

cnv.text: 於是巴比倫人來，上了她愛情的床，與她行淫玷污了她；她被他們玷污以後，心就與他們疏遠。

ccb.text: 巴比伦人便来上她的床，放纵情欲玷污了她。之后，她便厌弃他们。
